steps.title: Substitute y = 11 into the perimeter equation
steps.content:
The given perimeter equation for the rectangular rug is $ 58 = 2x + 2y $. The width $ y $ of the rug is given as 11 feet. Substitute this value into the equation:
$$ 58 = 2x + 2(11) $$
Simplify the right side: $$ 58 = 2x + 22 $$
Subtract 22 from both sides: $$ 36 = 2x $$
Divide both sides by 2: $$ x = 18 $$
The answer is 18.
